name: community-os-lite
description: Lightweight multi-bot Telegram admin with LLM support. FastAPI + Lite UI + long-polling telegram_runner. Supports MiniMax, OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek.
author: CommunityOS

security.auth_note: Lite UI supports optional password via LITE_PASSWORD env var. Without it, /lite is unprotected — only use on localhost.
